2606.12397.title: Redesign Mixture-of-Experts Routers with Manifold Power Iteration
2606.12397.paper_summary: Router is the cornerstone component to the Mixture-of-Experts models. Serving as expert proxies, the rows of the router matrix compute their similarity to the MoE inputs to determine which subset of experts is activated. Ideally, each router row is designed to encode the expert matrix into this representative vector, such that its dot-product with token can better reflect token-expert affinity. However, there exists no design principles to enforce this condensation. In this paper, we propose to align each router row with the principal singular direction of the associated expert, as this direction provides the most expressive mathematical description of a matrix. Based on this principle, we propose a router redesign with Manifold Power Iteration (MPI). Specifically, it introduces a "Power-then-Retract" paradigm, where a power iteration step is performed on the router weights, followed by a retraction to impose a norm constraint to ensure both efficiency and stability. Theoretically, we show that MPI drives router rows to converge toward the principal singular directions of associated experts. Empirically, we pretrain MoE model across scales from 1B to 11B parameters to confirm that this alignment facilitates more effective MoE models.
2606.12397.paper_summary_zh: 路由器是混合專家模型的基石組件。作為專家的代理，路由器矩陣的行計算它們與 MoE 輸入的相似性，以確定啟用哪一子集的專家。理想情況下，每個路由器行的設計旨在將專家矩陣編碼為這個代表向量，使其與標記的點積能更好地反映標記與專家的親和力。然而，並不存在強制這種凝聚的設計原則。在本文中，我們提出將每個路由器行與相關專家的主奇異方向對齊，因為這一方向提供了矩陣最具表達性的數學描述。基於這一原則，我們提出了一種使用流形幂迭代（MPI）的路由器重新設計。具體而言，它引入了一個“先幂後收縮”的範式，其中在路由器權重上執行幂迭代步驟，然後進行收縮以施加範數約束，以確保效率和穩定性。在理論上，我們表明 MPI 使路由器行收斂到相關專家的主奇異方向。在實證上，我們在從 1B 到 11B 參數的不同規模上預訓練 MoE 模型，以確認這種對齊促進了更有效的 MoE 模型。
2606.12397.author: Songhao Wu et.al.
2606.12397.authors: Songhao Wu, Ang Lv, Ruobing Xie, Yankai Lin
